scripts.dev: bash -c '. ./scripts/runtime-detect.sh && $COMPANYGRAPH_COMPOSE_CMD up -d neo4j && ./scripts/wait-for-neo4j.sh && concurrently -k -n api,pwa "bun --cwd api run dev" "bun --cwd pwa run dev"'
scripts.typecheck: bun build api/src/server.ts --target=bun --no-bundle --outdir /tmp/companygraph-tc > /dev/null && bun build pwa/src/main.tsx --target=browser --no-bundle --outdir /tmp/companygraph-tc-pwa > /dev/null
